blockers: Preview script (MAMBA_GAZE/tools/render_model_preview.py) hardcodes JSON prefix MeshMamba_non_texture_<model>.json; needs a --json-prefix or --dataset-variant flag before rgb_texture previews are reliable.
Transform recipe not validated dataset-wide; currently inherits non_texture hypothesis.
Texture-faithful preview requires Blender (heavy path); geometry-only preview may be accepted as phase-1 proxy — confirm with GPT.

side_inputs_to_mirror.note: json metadata is mandatory; do not skip.

transform_recipe.note: Must perform preview validation before any metric run. Start only after non_texture protocol is stable.

benchmark_validity_rules: Do not start rgb_texture benchmarking before non_texture protocol is stable.
GT is per-face. Do not use vertex-level predictions directly against face-level GT.
